ARM.thesis: ARM's outperformance during broad semiconductor selloff indicates flight to quality in CPU/GPU IP licensing; earnings visibility and foundational position in AI chip architecture should support continued upside as market rotates back to quality growth.

AKAM.thesis: AKAM trades at attractive valuation relative to growth amid sector selloff. Positioned in mission-critical cyber/edge infrastructure with recurring SaaS revenue model; benefits from secular AI/cloud capex cycle and enterprise digital transformation. Entry captures oversold opportunity while macro remains uncertain.

MRVL.thesis: MRVL benefits from secular AI capex cycle and data center networking TAM expansion. Outperformance during correction signals institutional quality rotation; breaking above recent highs would confirm continuation. Catalysts: upcoming earnings guidance on AI/cloud adoption trends, semiconductor demand data.

TSEM.thesis: TSEM is a pure-play beneficiary of AI capex cycle and foundational supplier to NVIDIA/AMD. Recent 38.8% 1M gain suggests smart money accumulation ahead of next leg. Breakout above $175 would confirm resumption of uptrend. Catalysts: semiconductor equipment orders data, earnings traction on advanced node demand.

ASML.thesis: ASML's order book and guidance are leading indicators for semiconductor capex cycle. Outperformance during selloff suggests institutional confidence in AI capex sustainability. Near-term pullback presents accumulation opportunity before next earnings cycle confirms continued demand strength.

NVDA.thesis: NVIDIA benefits from AI capex cycle durability (SoftBank/OpenAI $852B valuation validates infrastructure spending) and geopolitical de-escalation reducing macro uncertainty.

AMAT.thesis: Applied Materials' AI-centric product strategy and semiconductor equipment order visibility provide leverage to foundry capex cycle; near-term pullback is setup for entry.

DOCN.thesis: DigitalOcean benefits from distributed cloud compute demand and AI developer adoption; recent consolidation after strong run presents entry into secular growth backdrop.
